item.title: War Game Warns Europe May Fail to Stop Russian Blitz
item.description: A high-level war game organized by a German newspaper in cooperation with the Wargaming Center at Helmut Schmidt University has raised fresh concerns ...

item.title: House Dems Aim to Curb State of the Union Disruptions
item.description: Top House Democrats are warning members not to act up during President Donald Trump's upcoming State of the Union address.
